SQLLite.SQL: SELECT du.user_id AS "UserId" ,du.title AS "Title" ,du.forenames AS "Forenames" ,du.surname AS "Surname" ,du.user_short_name AS "UserShortName" ,uc.court_code AS "OwningCourtCode" ,c.name AS "OwningCourtName" ,ur.role_id AS "Role" ,(SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM user_role ur2 WHERE ur2.user_id = du.user_id AND ur2.role_id = 'admin') AS "Admin" ,(SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM user_role ur3 WHERE ur3.user_id = du.user_id AND ur3.role_id = 'sAdmin') AS "SuperAdmin" FROM dca_user du, user_court uc, user_role ur, courts c WHERE du.user_id = ${param.dcaUserId} AND uc.user_id = du.user_id AND ur.user_id = uc.user_id AND ur.role_id NOT IN ('admin','sAdmin') AND c.code = uc.court_code
